question_text:
Bitwise AND of Numbers Range

Given two integers `left` and `right` that represent the range `[left, right]`, return the bitwise AND of all numbers in this range, inclusive.
input_format: Space-separated values as per problem arguments.
output_format: A single line representing the result.
explanation: The bitwise AND of a range is the common prefix of the binary representations of the start and end numbers. Any bits that differ between them will eventually flip to 0 during the AND operations in the range. O(log N) time.
